verse_text: But when the Lord saw Leah was hated, He opened her womb; but Rachel was barren.

links.context: To be barren was a public reproach (v. 25), but like Sarah ([[GEN.16:1]]), Rebekah (Gn 25:21), Rachel ([[GEN.29:31]]), Hannah (1Kg 1:2), and Anna, the mother of the Virgin Mary, Elizabeth's temporary barrenness was in fulfillment of God's plan for the salvation of His people.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
